native_projects.name: gautostart
build: meson setup build-sqgi-demo --wipe -Dportal=disabled -Dintrospection=enabled || meson setup build-sqgi-demo -Dportal=disabled -Dintrospection=enabled

native_projects.name: gautostart
build: meson setup build-linux-x86_64 --wipe --prefix "$SQGI_LINUX_PREFIX" --libdir "lib/$SQGI_LINUX_TRIPLET" --buildtype=release -Dportal=disabled -Dintrospection=disabled ${SQGI_LINUX_MESON_CROSS_FILE:+--cross-file "$SQGI_LINUX_MESON_CROSS_FILE"} || meson setup build-linux-x86_64 --prefix "$SQGI_LINUX_PREFIX" --libdir "lib/$SQGI_LINUX_TRIPLET" --buildtype=release -Dportal=disabled -Dintrospection=disabled ${SQGI_LINUX_MESON_CROSS_FILE:+--cross-file "$SQGI_LINUX_MESON_CROSS_FILE"}

env -i PATH=/usr/local/bin:/usr/bin:/bin HOME="$HOME" meson setup build-host --wipe --buildtype=release -Dportal=disabled -Dintrospection=enabled || env -i PATH=/usr/local/bin:/usr/bin:/bin HOME="$HOME" meson setup build-host --buildtype=release -Dportal=disabled -Dintrospection=enabled
env -i PATH=/usr/local/bin:/usr/bin:/bin HOME="$HOME" meson compile -C build-host GAutostart-1.0.typelib

native_projects.name: gautostart
build: meson setup build-windows-x86_64 --wipe --prefix "$SQGI_WINDOWS_PREFIX" --buildtype=release -Dportal=disabled -Dintrospection=disabled --cross-file "$SQGI_MESON_CROSS_FILE" || meson setup build-windows-x86_64 --prefix "$SQGI_WINDOWS_PREFIX" --buildtype=release -Dportal=disabled -Dintrospection=disabled --cross-file "$SQGI_MESON_CROSS_FILE"

env -i PATH=/usr/local/bin:/usr/bin:/bin HOME="$HOME" meson setup build-host --wipe --buildtype=release -Dportal=disabled -Dintrospection=enabled || env -i PATH=/usr/local/bin:/usr/bin:/bin HOME="$HOME" meson setup build-host --buildtype=release -Dportal=disabled -Dintrospection=enabled
env -i PATH=/usr/local/bin:/usr/bin:/bin HOME="$HOME" meson compile -C build-host GAutostart-1.0.gir
